title: Architecture decision record
task: Write an ADR for splitting a reporting feature into ingestion, storage, and dashboard layers.
context: The team needs a concise decision record with tradeoffs, constraints, and follow-up risks.

route.path: Architecture / ADR > Reporting pipeline > Layered decision
route.reason: Architecture owns the decision, C4 clarifies system boundaries, and spec mining extracts constraints from the request.
